_featured_help: Slugs of shoots for the 'Featured Work' section, in display order. Leave empty to hide that section and let all shoots flow into the main 'All Shoots' grid below.
_heroPhotos_help: Hand-pick the 5 photos that appear in the hero card row. Each entry: 'slug' uses the shoot's first photo, 'slug#3' uses the 4th photo of that shoot (0-indexed), or { "url": "https://..." } pins any URL. Empty array = auto-pick lead photos from up to 5 different categories.
_gridShoots_help: Allowlist of shoots for the main 'All Shoots' grid, in display order. Each entry is a slug. Empty array = show every shoot (default). Example: ["kellykellykelly", "audreyandevelynbernie", "dylangrace"]
_excludeShoots_help: Blocklist of shoots to hide from the grid. Useful when you want 'everything except a few'. Slugs listed here are filtered out even if they appear in gridShoots. Example: ["old-test-shoot", "private-family-2019"]
_leadPhotos_help: Override which photo of a shoot is used as its thumbnail in the grid. Value is a number (zero-based index into that shoot's photo list), a 'slug#3' style string, or a full URL to pin any image. Example: { "kellykellykelly": 4, "craigshoemaker": "https://images.pixieset.com/.../some-photo-xlarge.jpg" }
_categoryOverrides_help: Force a specific category for individual shoots. Beats categoryRules. Example: { "kellykellykelly": "events", "craigshoemaker": "headshots" }
_categoryRules_help: First-match keyword rules. Categories that appear become filter buttons on the site.
